bugs_fixed.evidence_before: elite bucket có dmg_taken {0.4, 0.45, 0.5} — derivation tier-only ép boss_id=6 (T7 thanh, dmg=0.4) vào elite cùng T7 boss (dmg=0.5) và new T7@0.45
bugs_fixed.root_cause: derive_boss_tier_class_from_numeric chỉ dùng tier → boss_id=6 (T7 thanh, anomaly trong seed) misclassified as elite
bugs_fixed.fix: derive_boss_tier_class(tier, npc_class): T7+thanh → raid (not elite). Elite spec dmg_taken 0.45 → 0.50 match seed T7 boss.
bugs_fixed.verify: audit_17 R15 elite={0.5} raid={0.4} after fix

bugs_fixed.evidence_before: 1187 generated names → 515 unique. Top dupes: ('Thủy Quái Phú Xuân', 7), ('Hắc Hổ Lý Triều', 7) — 7-fold collision
bugs_fixed.root_cause: Pool 15 root × 3 era_title × 5 era = 225 combos, deterministic SHA mod cluster + skew amplifies collision tại N=1187
bugs_fixed.fix: Add 30 modifier prefix pool + boss_id:04d suffix → 'Đại Thủy Quái Phú Xuân 0014'. Namespace 30×15×3×5 + numeric → guaranteed unique.

semantic_note: v1.1 derivation (tier, npc_class) phù hợp seed pattern hơn v1.0 — boss_id=6 (T7 thanh) là raid (semantic correct) thay vì elite (tier-only artifact).
